hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git +reset( +--hard| +[^-]|$)|git +clean +.*-[a-z]*f|git +checkout +(--|\.)|git +restore( +[^-]|$)|git +stash +(drop|clear)|git +rebase|git +push +.*(--force|-f)'; then cd /Users/jayphi/Documents/github/vectura-studio; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then now=$(date +%s); s=$(git stash list --format='%cd' --date=unix 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -1); t=$(git for-each-ref --format='%(creatordate:unix)' 'refs/tags/recover-*' 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -1); newest=0; if [ -n "$s" ] && [ "$s" -gt "$newest" ]; then newest=$s; fi; if [ -n "$t" ] && [ "$t" -gt "$newest" ]; then newest=$t; fi; if [ "$newest" -eq 0 ] || [ $((now - newest)) -gt 1800 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: destructive git op on a dirty working tree with no recent recovery checkpoint (stale checkpoints don't count — create a fresh one). First create one — git tag recover-<slug> \$(git stash create) or a WIP commit — delete stale recover-* tags after use, then get explicit user approval naming this operation. See CLAUDE.md > Concurrent Development & Working-Tree Safety." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--amend'; then ( cd /Users/jayphi/Documents/github/vectura-studio && staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if echo "$staged" | grep -qx 'package.json'; then exit 0; fi; if ! echo "$staged" | grep -qE '^(src/|index\.html|styles\.css|tests/)'; then exit 0; fi && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const v=p.version.split('.');v[2]=String(Number(v[2])+1);p.version=v.join('.');fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');" && npm run version:sync --silent && git add package.json src/config/version.js index.html ) > /dev/null 2>&1; fi
